all.en: Meeting notes: Q1 Pipeline Forecast Review, conference room Atlas
all.zh: 會議紀錄：Q1 業務漏斗預測檢視，會議室 Atlas

all.en: Attendees: VP of Sales Olivia Sanders and three regional managers
all.zh: 與會者：業務副總 Olivia Sanders 及三位區域經理

all.en: Duration: ninety minutes, starting nine sharp Monday morning
all.zh: 時長：九十分鐘，週一上午九點準時開始

all.en: Olivia opened with a reminder about quarter-end commitment accuracy
all.zh: Olivia 開場提醒大家季末承諾準確度的重要性

all.en: Last quarter the team overshot the forecast by eighteen percent
all.zh: 上季團隊預測高估達百分之十八

all.en: She emphasized that sandbagging hurts territory planning long-term
all.zh: 她強調保守報數長期會傷害區域規劃

all.en: Northeast region was up first, presented by manager Felix Donovan
all.zh: 第一個輪到東北區，由經理 Felix Donovan 報告

all.en: Felix reported sixty-two opportunities with combined value of four point one million
all.zh: Felix 報告六十二個商機，總值四百一十萬美元

all.en: Weighted pipeline using stage probabilities lands at two point three million
all.zh: 依階段機率加權後的漏斗為兩百三十萬美元

all.en: His commit number for the quarter is one point seven million
all.zh: 他本季的承諾數字為一百七十萬美元

all.en: Olivia challenged the gap between weighted and committed figures
all.zh: Olivia 質疑加權與承諾數字之間的落差

all.en: Felix explained two large enterprise deals slipped from late stage
all.zh: Felix 解釋有兩筆大型企業案從後期階段延後

all.en: The first slipped due to a procurement freeze at the prospect
all.zh: 第一筆因準客戶採購凍結而延後

all.en: The second is awaiting legal redlines on the master services agreement
all.zh: 第二筆正在等候主服務合約的法務修訂

all.en: Olivia requested weekly updates on both deals until close
all.zh: Olivia 要求兩筆案件結案前每週更新

all.en: Midwest region followed, presented by manager Priya Chandrasekaran
all.zh: 接著由中西區經理 Priya Chandrasekaran 報告

all.en: Priya's territory shows strong momentum in the mid-market segment
all.zh: Priya 的轄區在中型市場展現強勁動能

all.en: Total pipeline stands at three point eight million across forty-one opportunities
all.zh: 總漏斗為三百八十萬美元，共四十一個商機

all.en: Her weighted figure is two point six million with high stage conversion
all.zh: 她的加權數字為兩百六十萬美元，階段轉換率高

all.en: She is committing two point one million for the quarter
all.zh: 她本季承諾數為兩百一十萬美元

all.en: Olivia praised the realistic gap between weighted and committed values
all.zh: Olivia 讚揚加權與承諾值之間落差合理

all.en: Priya highlighted a marquee logo, Cascade Holdings, expected to close in March
all.zh: Priya 強調指標客戶 Cascade Holdings 預計三月成交

all.en: The deal size is approximately four hundred and fifty thousand
all.zh: 案件金額約四十五萬美元

all.en: She requested executive sponsor support for the final negotiation
all.zh: 她請求高階主管支援最後談判

all.en: Olivia agreed to join the closing call personally next Wednesday
all.zh: Olivia 同意下週三親自加入結案會議

all.en: West Coast region closed the rotation, presented by Marcus Hadley
all.zh: 西岸區作為最後輪報告，由 Marcus Hadley 主講

all.en: Marcus reported the largest pipeline at five point two million
all.zh: Marcus 報告最大漏斗，達五百二十萬美元

all.en: However, twenty-eight percent of value sits in early discovery stage
all.zh: 然而百分之二十八的價值停留在早期探索階段

all.en: Weighted pipeline is only two point four million as a result
all.zh: 因此加權漏斗僅兩百四十萬美元

all.en: His commit is one point nine million, slightly above weighted
all.zh: 他的承諾為一百九十萬美元，略高於加權

all.en: Olivia questioned the heavy early-stage concentration
all.zh: Olivia 質疑早期階段比重偏高

all.en: Marcus admitted two account executives are still ramping after onboarding
all.zh: Marcus 坦承兩位業務代表仍在到職後爬坡期

all.en: He proposed pairing them with senior reps for joint discovery calls
all.zh: 他建議讓他們與資深業務搭檔進行聯合探索通話

all.en: Olivia approved the buddy program for an initial sixty-day period
all.zh: Olivia 核准首期六十天的師徒制計畫

all.en: She asked all managers to scrub stale opportunities over ninety days
all.zh: 她要求所有經理清理超過九十天的陳舊商機

all.en: Opportunities without recent activity should be marked dormant or closed lost
all.zh: 無近期活動的商機應標示為休眠或失單

all.en: Clean data drives accurate forecasting and better resource allocation
all.zh: 資料乾淨才能精準預測並更好地分配資源

all.en: The total committed forecast across regions is five point seven million
all.zh: 各區合計承諾預測為五百七十萬美元

all.en: This represents ninety-four percent of the quarterly quota
all.zh: 此數字相當於季度配額的百分之九十四

all.en: Olivia requested a stretch plan to close the six-point gap
all.zh: Olivia 要求提出彌補六個百分點差距的延伸計畫

all.en: Each manager will identify two upside deals from outside the commit
all.zh: 每位經理將從承諾外挑選兩筆上行案件

all.en: Those deals must have written customer signals indicating purchase intent
all.zh: 該案件必須有客戶書面訊號顯示購買意向

all.en: Discounting discipline was the next major topic on the agenda
all.zh: 議程下一個重點為折扣紀律

all.en: Average discount last quarter crept up to twenty-two percent
all.zh: 上季平均折扣攀升至百分之二十二

all.en: Olivia set a target of eighteen percent for Q1
all.zh: Olivia 為 Q1 設定百分之十八的目標

all.en: Any discount above twenty-five percent now requires VP approval
all.zh: 任何高於百分之二十五的折扣現需副總核准

all.en: Deal desk turnaround time was confirmed at twenty-four business hours
all.zh: 案件審核台處理時間確定為二十四個工作小時

all.en: Managers were reminded to leverage value-based selling techniques
all.zh: 提醒經理運用價值導向銷售技巧

all.en: ROI calculators have been updated and distributed to all sellers
all.zh: 投資報酬率計算工具已更新並發放給所有業務

all.en: The forecast cadence will continue weekly on Monday mornings
all.zh: 預測檢視節奏將維持每週一上午

all.en: Mid-quarter deep dive is scheduled for February fifteenth
all.zh: 季中深度檢視排定於二月十五日

all.en: Quarter-end commit lock occurs on March twenty-fifth at noon
all.zh: 季末承諾鎖定時間為三月二十五日中午

all.en: Action items will be tracked in the shared Salesforce dashboard
all.zh: 行動項目將在共用的 Salesforce 儀表板追蹤

all.en: She closed with a reminder that accuracy beats optimism every time
all.zh: 她以「準確永遠勝過樂觀」作結語提醒大家

all.en: Meeting adjourned at ten thirty-two, recording posted to the intranet
all.zh: 會議於十點三十二分散會，錄影已上傳至公司內網
